match.userMessage:
Classify music design for each scene and generate a unified music prompt for the sequence.

<SCENES>
[
  {
    "sceneId": "scene1",
    "title": "Studio Vanity Application",
    "storyBeat": "Introduction of Scarlett applying coral lipstick in bright studio light with voiceover",
    "durationSeconds": 8,
    "location": "INT. BONDI STUDIO - MORNING",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "Clean, fresh, minimal morning calm with coral accent pop"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene2",
    "title": "Promenade Walk",
    "storyBeat": "Scarlett walking the promenade with dynamic beach background and voiceover",
    "durationSeconds": 6,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH PROMENADE",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, sensory, and effortlessly cool with energetic yet light coastal breeze feeling"
  },
  {
    "sceneId": "scene3",
    "title": "Shoreline Reveal",
    "storyBeat": "Climactic shoreline moment with product detail, laughter, final voiceover and product super",
    "durationSeconds": 10,
    "location": "EXT. BONDI BEACH - SHORELINE",
    "timeOfDay": "morning",
    "visualSummary": "Fresh, sensory, effortlessly cool coastal moment with serene potential energy"
  }
]
</SCENES>

For each scene, classify:
1. presence: "none"|"minimal"|"moderate"|"full"
2. style: Genre/instrumentation (if music present)
3. mood: Emotional quality (if music present)
4. atmosphere: Environmental atmosphere

Then synthesize unified tags (starting with "instrumental") and a 1-2 sentence prompt for one cohesive music track.

Respond with ONLY valid JSON matching the schema.
